brands.name: Pablo
brands.description: High-strength pouch brand from N.G.P Tobacco with broad fruit, mint, cola, and original-style profiles across multiple strength bands.

brands.name: Iceberg
brands.description: High-strength nicotine pouch brand distributed through Iceberg Distribution, focused on experienced users and strong fruit and mint profiles.

brands.name: Cuba
brands.description: Mainstream Eastern European pouch brand from Nicotobacco Factory spanning Cuba White, Cuba Ninja, and stronger Cuba Black-style lines.
